title: <div>Ask for Feedback: Share your essay with peers, mentors, or professors and g
content:
Ask for Feedback: Share your essay with peers, mentors, or professors and gather feedback. External perspectives can enlighten and help you see your work from different angles.
Keep a Writing Journal: Consider maintaining a writing journal where you document your thoughts and insights during the essay writing process. This can serve as a valuable reference for future reflection.
After you finish this page, click Next to continue to The Evolution of Writing.


Week 6 | The Evolution of Writing

The Evolution of Writing
Improving your writing skills can have a profound impact on your thinking processes. You are writing forces you to clarify your thoughts and coherently articulate them. When you compose an essay or even a simple email, you translate ideas into concrete words. This process compels you to organize your thoughts, identify gaps in your understanding, and make connections between disparate concepts. Through writing, you refine your ability to express complex ideas clearly, encouraging a deeper understanding of the subject matter. Writing forces you to think critically as you evaluate evidence, consider multiple perspectives, and develop well-structured arguments. Writing becomes a cognitive exercise that enhances your analytical skills and encourages you to approach problems more systematically.
